# Onyx AI Studio
> AI business operations integration for reception, website assistance, lead capture, scheduling, company knowledge, data handling, and internal employee support.

## Main Pages
- `Home -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/`: Flagship AI operations integration overview, problem framing, system overview, portfolio proof, pricing, and review CTA.
- `AI Business System -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services`: Overview of the system components.
- `Portfolio -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/portfolio`: Hub for 20 live SaaS demos plus links to deeper case studies.
- `Demo Launcher -> https://onyx-portfolio-demos.vercel.app/apps`: Live external portfolio deployment with all 20 demo apps.
- `Case Studies -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/case-studies`: Client proof across AI operations modules, assistant interfaces, data handling, workflow automation, lead capture, and custom implementation.
- `Insights -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/insights`: Practical articles about AI operations, internal assistants, guardrails, semantic search, and business data handling.
- `Pricing -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/pricing`: Implementation and monthly management ranges.
- `Contact -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/contact`: AI Operations Review request page.

## Key Service Pages
- `AI Business Operations Integration -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/ai-integration`: Flagship managed system for reception, website assistance, lead capture, scheduling, Supabase business data, guardrails, and monthly management.
- `Reception + Website Assistant -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/reception-web-assistant`: Phone AI receptionist and website assistant built around approved business knowledge.
- `Internal Business Assistant -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/internal-business-assistant`: Employee-facing assistant for company files, SOPs, policies, call summaries, lead records, and business data.
- `Guardrails + Knowledge Systems -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/guardrails-knowledge-systems`: Pricing boundaries, escalation rules, sensitive information handling, public/internal data separation, and document-grounded answers.
- `Lead Follow-Up + Workflow Automation -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/automation-workflows`: Workflows that move leads, calls, summaries, appointments, and follow-up tasks through the business.
- `Business Website + Lead Capture Layer -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/web-development`: The front-end layer of the AI business system.
- `Demand Generation Content System -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/services/seo-content-systems`: SEO and answer-ready content that feeds AI lead capture and assistant source material.

## Priority Proof And Insight Pages
- `Portfolio Hub -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/portfolio`: Client-facing index of all live SaaS demos and case-study proof.
- `VapeOS Case Study -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/case-studies/vapeos`: AI operations module showing how messy business data can become a usable search interface.
- `Regional Service Site -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/case-studies/regional-service-site`: Lead capture and demand-generation structure for service businesses.
- `AI Inventory Search For Vape Shops -> https://onyxaistudio.digital/insights/ai-inventory-search-vape-shops-messy-catalogs`: Practical article on semantic search for messy retail product catalogs and business data.

## Key Facts
- Onyx AI Studio does not sell Retell or Supabase as standalone products. Retell is the voice and conversation layer; Supabase is the business data and knowledge layer.
- Clients pay Retell and third-party platform usage directly.
- Onyx AI Studio charges for strategy, implementation, integration, guardrails, knowledge structuring, data handling, ongoing optimization, and management.
- Pricing ranges: $4,000-$10,000 implementation and $750-$1,500/month management.
- Primary CTA: Request an AI Operations Review.
